x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: CMDB correctness measures whether CI data reflects actual infrastructure state. Low correctness means Now Assist is reasoning over data that does not represent the real environment.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Enable CMDB Health Correctness job via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Target: 75%+ correctness. Address top correctness detractors (orphaned, stale, duplicate CIs) identified by the health dashboard.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c60
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[CMDB correctness measures whether CI data reflects actual infrastructure state. Low correctness means Now Assist is reasoning over data that does not represent the real environment.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Overall CMDB Correctness Score</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table cmdb_health_scorecard not found", finding: "CMDB Health Scorecard table is not available. Verify the CMDB Health plugin is active." };
    }
    var gr = new GlideRecord("cmdb_health_scorecard");
    gr.orderByDesc("sys_created_on");
    gr.setLimit(1);
    gr.query();
    if (gr.next()) {
        var score = parseFloat(gr.getValue("correctness_score") || 0);
        var actualValue = "CMDB Correctness Score: " + score + "%";
        if (score >= 75) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Correctness Score is " + score + "%. CI data is current and accurate — Now Assist AI recommendations will reflect the actual state of infrastructure." };
        if (score >= 50) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Correctness Score is " + score + "% (target: 75%+). Incorrect CI data will cause Now Assist to recommend remediations based on outdated infrastructure state." };
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "CMDB Correctness Score is only " + score + "%. Critical correctness gap — Now Assist AI recommendations are unreliable when the majority of CI data is incorrect or stale." };
    }
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);
    var gaFresh = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci");
    gaFresh.addQuery("install_status", 1);
    gaFresh.addQuery("sys_updated_on", ">=", cutoff.getValue());
    gaFresh.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaFresh.query();
    var fresh = gaFresh.next() ? parseInt(gaFresh.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate("cmdb_ci");
    gaTotal.addQuery("install_status", 1);
    gaTotal.addAggregate("COUNT");
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var pct = total > 0 ? Math.round((fresh / total) * 100) : 0;
    var actualValue = "Proxy correctness: " + pct + "% of CIs updated in last 90 days (" + fresh + " of " + total + "). Enable CMDB Health jobs for official score.";
    if (pct >= 75) return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy correctness: " + pct + "% of CIs updated in last 90 days." };
    if (pct >= 50) return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy correctness: only " + pct + "% of CIs updated in last 90 days (target: 75%+)." };
    return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Proxy correctness: only " + pct + "% of CIs updated in last 90 days. Most CI data is likely stale." };
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CMDB</module>
<number>CHK0006003</number>
<order>60</order>
<remediation_guidance>Enable CMDB Health Correctness job via: All > Configuration > CMDB Dashboard > CMDB Health Dashboard Jobs. Target: 75%+ correctness. Address top correctness detractors (orphaned, stale, duplicate CIs) identified by the health dashboard.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>0a03a33acfd903108935fb251d851c60</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
